props.value: Custom cakes baked fresh for life's sweetest moments — no mixes, no shortcuts, just pure love.
Velvety red layers with rose cream cheese frosting & edible gold leaf
Rich dark chocolate ganache with layers of toasted hazelnut praline
Zesty lemon sponge soaked in elderflower syrup with whipped mascarpone
Airy chiffon layers with fresh strawberry compote and cloud-like chantilly cream
Butterscotch sponge with house-made salted caramel, feuilletine crunch & caramel drip
Red velvet base, rose cream cheese frosting, edible gold
Dark ganache, toasted hazelnut praline, chocolate mirror glaze
Lemon sponge, elderflower syrup, whipped mascarpone
Airy chiffon, fresh strawberry compote, chantilly cream
Butterscotch sponge, house-made caramel, feuilletine crunch
Vanilla lavender sponge, local honey buttercream, dried lavender
Madagascar vanilla sponge with Swiss meringue buttercream
Crimson red velvet topped with tangy cream cheese frosting
Ceremonial grade matcha sponge with white chocolate ganache
Double espresso sponge swirled with salted caramel buttercream
Fall spiced pumpkin layers, brown sugar cream cheese, candied pecans
Cranberry & blueberry compote, white chocolate bark, sugar holly

Hi, I'm Sophie! What started as weekend hobby baking for friends and family grew into a full-blown passion that I simply couldn't keep to myself. Five years ago, I turned my Brooklyn kitchen into a one-woman bakery — and I haven't looked back since.

Every cake I make is completely from scratch — no box mixes, no shortcuts, no artificial flavors. I source local dairy, seasonal fruits, and premium chocolate to create cakes that taste as beautiful as they look. My business has grown entirely through word of mouth, and that means everything to me. 🧡
